[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [plugins](../../../index.md) / [TextmodePluginContext](../../TextmodePluginContext.md) / removeLayerExtension

# Method: removeLayerExtension()

```ts
removeLayerExtension(methodName): void;
```

Remove a method extension from TextmodeLayer.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `methodName` | `string` | The name of the method to remove. |

## Returns

`void`
